subject: A ransacked display case or evidence cabinet, broken glass, scattered mechanical artifacts, and glowing blue magical energy
description: The image depicts a multi-shelf display case or cabinet with shattered glass panels. Blue magical energy pulses and swirls inside and around the case, suggesting something powerful or dangerous has either escaped or been activated. On the shelves sit various mechanical artifacts: box-like devices with lenses, a rounded dome or globe, a small mechanical skull, and what appears to be a small automaton or thopter. Papers and documents are scattered across the lower portion of the image, some torn. The entire scene reads as a crime scene — something has been stolen or broken out, and the residual magical signature remains.
foreground: Broken glass, scattered papers, mechanical skull artifact on floor
background: Multi-shelf display case with shattered glass, glowing blue energy, mechanical artifacts
emotion: Ominous stillness after violence — the scene radiates danger and loss
